issues_found.description: Opening black frame (t=0s) followed by silent/pre-speech dead air; audio RMS < 0.002 throughout; no usable content
Pure white frame burst (mean pixel = 255) lasting ~0.83s (25 frames at 30fps); non-content visual artifact
~5s of massively overexposed frames (mean pixel ~238.9); concurrent audio is near-silent (RMS < 0.01); completely unusable section
2.4-second complete audio silence (RMS = 0.000) with video still playing; technical audio dropout artifact
Final black frame at t=101s with trailing silence; trimmed at t=101.0s
Source integrated loudness: -27.05 LUFS; true peak: +2.09 dBTP (already clipping in source); applied loudnorm to target -16 LUFS / -1 dBTP

operations.reason: Remove black frame and silent dead-air start (no speech until ~5s, first activity at 3.1s)
First content segment: tutorial intro, clap explanation begins; clap transients at source t~11s preserved
Remove white flash artifact (pure white, mean=255, ~0.83s)
Second content segment: continuation of tutorial content
Remove overexposed/white section (mean~238.9, ~5s) with near-silent audio; non-content artifact
Third content segment: tutorial continuation; clap transient at source t~51.9s (output t~40s) preserved
Remove 2.4s dead audio dropout (absolute silence in both channels while video continues)
Fourth and final content segment: includes clap demonstration cluster at source t=79-81s (output t~68-70s) with explanation
Concatenate the 4 clean segments into a single continuous timeline
Normalize speech loudness from -27 LUFS to target -16 LUFS; true peak limited to -1 dBTP to prevent clipping; dynamic normalization chosen because source true peak was +2.09 dBTP (clipping)

checks_performed: Sampled output at 1fps (90 frames): NO black frames, NO white frames, NO frozen frames detected
Output audio RMS per second: min=-30 dBFS, max=-15.6 dBFS — no silence seconds, speech level acceptable
Output audio peak: 1.0000 (1 sample; expected rounding artifact after AAC encode/decode cycle, inaudible)
Clap transients confirmed present in output: t~2-9s (source t=5-12s clap series), t~40s (source t=79-81s clap demonstration cluster)
Audio loudnorm: input_i=-27.05 LUFS, output_i=-18.19 LUFS, output_tp=-1.00 dBTP
No external footage, synthetic speech, or overlays added
